items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: "on the basis that you have oscar and lando, if max was available, you wouldn't sign him?" zak…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：“既然你有Oscar和Lando，如果Max也在的话，你就不会签下他了吧？”Zak Brown说道：“不，不。Lando和Oscar已经把名字刻在了他们的座位上，而且他们也没有清空过储物柜，所以他们不会离开的。”
items.summary: "on the basis that you have oscar and lando, if max was available, you wouldn't sign him?" zak brown: "no, no. lando and oscar have their names engraved on their race seat and they haven't emptied out their lockers, so they're not going anywhere." https://t.co/NgcSxvyQYV
items.summary_zh: “既然你有Oscar和Lando，如果Max也在的话，你就不会签下他了吧？”Zak Brown说道：“不，不。Lando和Oscar已经把名字刻在了他们的座位上，而且他们也没有清空过储物柜，所以他们不会离开的。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: "LN or OP, who'd you trust more to be ceo of mcl for a day?" ZB: OP "who'd you least wanna be s…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：“LN 还是 OP，你会更信任谁来担任 MCL 的 CEO 一天呢？”ZB 回答：OP。“你最不希望和谁一起乘坐电梯呢？”ZB 继续问：LN。我们认识 EO 已经十年了，我们已经受够了 EO 那种“最装扮得漂漂亮亮的”作风。ZB 补充说：“最大的派对女王是谁呢？”LN 回答：“他们不会提出什么特殊要求，不过感觉 LN 会更合适一些。”
items.summary: "LN or OP, who'd you trust more to be ceo of mcl for a day?" ZB: OP "who'd you least wanna be stuck in a lift with?" ZB: LN. we've known eo for 10 years, we're tired of eo "best dressed?" ZB: LN "biggest diva?" zb: they dont make diva demands but you kinda feel like LN would https://t.co/uY0EdXSvbF
items.summary_zh: “LN 还是 OP，你会更信任谁来担任 MCL 的 CEO 一天呢？”ZB 回答：OP。“你最不希望和谁一起乘坐电梯呢？”ZB 继续问：LN。我们认识 EO 已经十年了，我们已经受够了 EO 那种“最装扮得漂漂亮亮的”作风。ZB 补充说：“最大的派对女王是谁呢？”LN 回答：“他们不会提出什么特殊要求，不过感觉 LN 会更合适一些。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: "we've got two awesome drivers. no intention of a different lineup. our plan is to keep going w…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：“我们有两位出色的车手。没有打算改变车队阵容。我们的计划是继续依靠现有的车手。” “你必须了解市场的情况，但我们的目标并非要参与市场竞争。Lando和Oscar去年为我们赢得了 14 场胜利，我期待着接下来的 14 场比赛。”
items.summary: "we've got two awesome drivers. no intention of a different lineup. our plan is to keep going with what we've got." "you gotta know what the market's doing but we're not in the market. lando and oscar won 14 for us last year and i'm looking forward to the next 14." https://t.co/V8SfKpynot
items.summary_zh: “我们有两位出色的车手。没有打算改变车队阵容。我们的计划是继续依靠现有的车手。” “你必须了解市场的情况，但我们的目标并非要参与市场竞争。Lando和Oscar去年为我们赢得了 14 场胜利，我期待着接下来的 14 场比赛。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: zak brown praises oscar's approach to racing! "my biggest problem in racing was i was very emot…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Zak Brown称赞了Oscar在比赛中的表现方式！“我在比赛中的最大问题就是情绪过于敏感。……当看到Oscar状态不佳时，他只是选择忽略这些情绪。而我，只会情绪暴躁，而那样显然无法帮助我取得胜利。”
items.summary: zak brown praises oscar's approach to racing! "my biggest problem in racing was i was very emotional. (...) when i look at the talent of oscar, when he has a bad day, he just shrugs it off. (...) all i would have done is being pissed off, which doesnt set you up for success." https://t.co/lqGO2ftDu4
items.summary_zh: Zak Brown称赞了Oscar在比赛中的表现方式！“我在比赛中的最大问题就是情绪过于敏感。……当看到Oscar状态不佳时，他只是选择忽略这些情绪。而我，只会情绪暴躁，而那样显然无法帮助我取得胜利。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: zak brown on f1 silly season and whether he'd like to keep the mclaren lineup: "i want continui…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：Zak Brown在 F1 赛季开始时提出了这样一个问题：他是否希望继续留在McLaren车队？他回答说：“我希望保持连续性。我希望Lando能在这里结束他的职业生涯，Oscar也是如此。同时，我也希望他能继续与队友一起比赛……不过这一切都得符合实际情况才行。”
items.summary: zak brown on f1 silly season and whether he'd like to keep the mclaren lineup: "i want continuity. i'd love lando to finish his career here, same thing with oscar, and be teammates... i'd like that. but it has to work." https://t.co/y34lRmcZiN
items.summary_zh: Zak Brown在 F1 赛季开始时提出了这样一个问题：他是否希望继续留在McLaren车队？他回答说：“我希望保持连续性。我希望Lando能在这里结束他的职业生涯，Oscar也是如此。同时，我也希望他能继续与队友一起比赛……不过这一切都得符合实际情况才行。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: the 3 artists in charge of designing oscar's special helmets for silverstone have posted little…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：负责设计Oscar特制头盔的 3 位设计师已经发布了一些预览图，让我们期待着本周末能看到的成果！你可以访问他们的 Instagram 账号，查看他们的作品，甚至在某些情况下还可以为最喜欢的作品投票哦😊
items.summary: the 3 artists in charge of designing oscar's special helmets for silverstone have posted little sneak peaks of what we'll get to see this weekend! you can head to their instagram to check out their work and even vote for your favourite in some cases 😊 https://t.co/jzuXLrMLJ4
items.summary_zh: 负责设计Oscar特制头盔的 3 位设计师已经发布了一些预览图，让我们期待着本周末能看到的成果！你可以访问他们的 Instagram 账号，查看他们的作品，甚至在某些情况下还可以为最喜欢的作品投票哦😊

source_status.reason: Instagram public collection not configured; use PIASNEWS_SOCIAL_INPUT import
